item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-n10","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":false,"first_sentence_lock":null,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":null,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant treated the prompt as a straightforward incident review request, identified likely causes and responsibility boundaries for each complaint, and provided practical remediation points.
